allow: Bash(echo "- [Theraptly product]\(theraptly-product.md\) — it's a healthcare staff training & compliance LMS, NOT a therapy app")
Bash(echo "- [Frontend stack]\(theraptly-frontend-stack.md\) — Next.js + shadcn/ui + Tailwind + mock auth layer")
Bash(npx --yes shadcn@latest add button input label card form select checkbox separator avatar progress badge sonner tabs dropdown-menu --yes)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "done")
